positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of cosmic botanical elements. Focus on large, stylized celestial flora and fauna, such as glowing nebula leaves, crescent moon roots, and stylized constellations integrated into tropical jungle patterns. The color palette should be deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and touches of shimmering gold and teal. Use a vibrant, bioluminescent glow effect against a deep space background. The composition must be centered, symmetrical, and utilize strong, clean silhouettes suitable for a repeating apparel print. Style: High-contrast vector graphic mixed with detailed etching linework, perfect for screen printing. Flat, clean lines, maximalist design.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signatures, logos, messy, poor anatomy, noisy, extra limbs, dirty, gradient, poor composition
